title: Kraken expands OTC lending through an onchain warehouse facility with Maple
message_html: Kraken expands OTC lending through an onchain warehouse facility with Maple ...
snippet: Maple’s lenders will provide a revolving line of funding to supply USDC liquidity for Kraken's over-the-counter borrowers.
